trash description: In Palafolls, it is mandatory to separate waste and dispose of it in the appropriate containers.
yellow: Yellow — plastic packaging, cans, and cartons
container description: Dispose of waste only in the designated containers. Leaving bags outside, on the street, roadside, or in natural areas is prohibited and may result in fines. In Palafolls, penalties for dumping waste outside the containers can reach up to €3,000 according to municipal regulations.
